title: Contaminomics
author: Anna Heintz-Buschart
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Workflows for the detection and analysis of contaminant sequences in low biomass sRNA sequencing experiments, including preparation of figures and tables for a manuscript which is accessible here: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/early/2018/01/03/232975 . The same workflows are available in a git repository here: https://git.ufz.de/metaOmics/contaminomics/ .
steps_raw: Workflows for the detection and analysis of contaminant sequences in low biomass sRNA sequencing experiments, including preparation of figures and tables for a manuscript which is accessible here: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/early/2018/01/03/232975 . The same workflows are available in a git repository here: https://git.ufz.de/metaOmics/contaminomics/ .
